name: School Employees
description_short: Moringa School is a tech bootcamp in Nairobi offering intensive coding and data science courses, not a financial services company.
description_long:
Moringa School is a technology education institution established in 2014 and based in Nairobi, Kenya. The school specializes in immersive, hands-on training in software development, data science, and related tech fields. It is not a consumer finance or credit company and does not offer payday alternatives, loans, credit repair, or any financial services to consumers.

The school offers multiple full-time and part-time courses including Software Development (5-6 months, KSh 150,000), Data Science Program, UI/UX Design, Cybersecurity, Product Management, Data Analytics, DevOps Engineering, and various specialized certifications like Certified Data Protection Officer and Prompt Engineering. All courses emphasize hands-on, project-based learning modeled after real workplace scenarios.

Moringa distinguishes itself through employment-focused training delivered by industry professionals with real-world experience, peer-to-peer collaborative learning, intensive boot-camp style curricula designed to make students job-ready in months, and partnerships with leading technology companies. The school provides career support services and job placement assistance to connect graduates with employers.

This company is fundamentally a vocational tech education provider, not a financial services firm. It has been incorrectly categorized as a payday alternative lender. There is no consumer finance product or service offered. The only monetary component is course fees paid by students seeking technology training.
services: Career support and job placement assistance
pros: Experienced instructors with real industry backgrounds providing mentorship
Intensive boot-camp format designed to make students job-ready in 5-6 months
Hands-on, project-based curriculum modeled after actual workplace scenarios
Job placement support and career services connecting graduates with employers
Peer-to-peer collaborative learning that builds communication and teamwork skills
Global partnerships with leading technology companies enhancing recognition
Multiple specialized course options (15+ programs) across different tech domains
cons: Not a financial services company—provides no consumer finance products or services
Located only in Nairobi, Kenya with limited geographic accessibility
Course fees (KSh 150,000+) may be prohibitive for low-income students without financing options
best_for: Career-switchers seeking intensive tech training in software development
Students in Kenya interested in data science and technology education
Individuals with limited tech background wanting accelerated job-ready training
diagnosis: Moringa School is a technology bootcamp and vocational education provider, not a financial services company. This company profile should be removed from CreditDoc entirely as it has no consumer finance offering whatsoever and serves an entirely different market (tech education, not lending or credit).
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
